benefits.description: Significant appetite suppression on initial 1 mg dose (only ate 1000 cal), but effect diminished after first day

side_effects.description: Appetite increased significantly at 2 mg dose, eating 2000-2500 cal per day, one day reaching 3000 cal. User typically maintains 1500-2000 cal per day. Also developed cravings for sweets.

protocol_notes: Started at 1 mg dose day 1 with significant appetite suppression. After 4 days, increased to 2 mg dose. Experiencing opposite of expected appetite suppression effect at higher dose. User tracking calories meticulously.
